main_post.text:
🔍 Harina v4.4.0: Google Sheets becomes a live operations dashboard

This release transforms receipt data into auto-refreshing dashboards with formula-driven analytics.

📊 Key Highlights:

• Live Dashboards: Analysis tabs now use Google Sheets formulas, so new receipt rows automatically recalculate KPIs, category totals, and charts

• Duplicate Controls: New 重複確認 sheet with checkbox-based auto-exclusion for clean analysis without touching raw data

• sync-analysis Command: Rebuild dashboards on-demand with targeted year options

• /resume_polling: Clear Drive watcher delays directly from Discord without container restarts

130 tests passed. Full docs in EN/JA.

$ONIAGI
